_comment: ProcmonReader test case configuration. Test data source: Logfile.zip in tests/res/.

_test_case_schema.name: (str) Unique test name shown in output.
_test_case_schema.pml_file: Absolute or relative (to this JSON file) path to the .pml file (or .zip containing .pml).
_test_case_schema.filters: Procmon formatted filters [field, op, val, action] or DSL dict. null/[] for no filter.
_test_case_schema.select_fields: Fields to include in each result dict.

expected.all_events: (dict) Every returned event must have these key=value pairs.
expected.first_event: (dict) First event must have these key=value pairs.
expected.last_event: (dict) Last event must have these key=value pairs.
expected.event_at: [{index, fields}] Event at position N must have matching fields.

test_cases.name: event_index_eq
test_cases.description: Filter by event_index == 100 — single event retrieval

test_cases.name: event_index_le
test_cases.description: Filter by event_index <= 4 — first 5 events

test_cases.name: event_index_ge
test_cases.description: Filter by event_index >= 108238 — last event

test_cases.name: first_event_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verify all fields of event_index 0

test_cases.name: last_event_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verify all fields of the last event (108238)

test_cases.name: event_class_file_system
test_cases.description: Filter by event_class == File System (narrowed to idx <= 1)

test_cases.name: event_class_registry
test_cases.description: Filter by event_class == Registry (narrowed to idx 147-152)

test_cases.name: event_class_process
test_cases.description: Filter by event_class == Process (narrowed to idx 225-466)

test_cases.name: event_class_network
test_cases.description: Filter by event_class == Network (narrowed to idx 215-443)

test_cases.name: event_class_profiling
test_cases.description: Filter by event_class == Profiling (narrowed to idx 2-6)

test_cases.name: event_class_ne_profiling
test_cases.description: Filter by event_class != Profiling (narrowed to idx <= 1)

test_cases.name: process_name_regex
test_cases.description: Filter by process_name regex svchost (narrowed to idx 440-446)

test_cases.name: process_name_regex_lsass
test_cases.description: Filter by process_name regex lsass (narrowed to idx <= 1)

test_cases.name: pid_eq
test_cases.description: Filter by pid == 744 (narrowed to idx <= 1)

test_cases.name: parent_pid_eq
test_cases.description: Filter by parent_pid == 716 (narrowed to idx 12-16)

test_cases.name: tid_eq
test_cases.description: Filter by tid == 796 (narrowed to idx <= 0)

test_cases.name: session_eq
test_cases.description: Filter by session == 1 (narrowed to idx 8-9)

test_cases.name: integrity_regex
test_cases.description: Filter by integrity regex High (narrowed to idx 100-150)

test_cases.name: user_regex
test_cases.description: Filter by user regex SYSTEM (narrowed to idx 0-5)

test_cases.name: image_path_regex
test_cases.description: Filter by image_path regex Windows\\system32 (narrowed to idx <= 5)

test_cases.name: command_line_regex
test_cases.description: Filter by command_line regex svc (narrowed to idx 440-445)

test_cases.name: company_regex
test_cases.description: Filter by company regex ^Microsoft (narrowed to idx <= 5)

test_cases.name: virtualized_eq
test_cases.description: Filter by virtualized == 0 (narrowed to idx 0-4, skips Idle which has n/a)

test_cases.name: is_64_bit_eq
test_cases.description: Filter by is_64_bit == 1 (narrowed to idx <= 5)

test_cases.name: operation_regex_regset_regquery
test_cases.description: Filter by operation regex RegSetValue|RegQueryValue + Registry (narrowed to idx 147-165)

test_cases.name: result_regex_name_not_found
test_cases.description: Filter by result regex NAME NOT FOUND (narrowed to idx 168-169)

test_cases.name: result_access_denied
test_cases.description: Filter by result regex ACCESS DENIED (first 3 events)

test_cases.name: result_buffer_overflow
test_cases.description: Filter by result regex BUFFER OVERFLOW (first 3 events)

test_cases.name: result_reparse
test_cases.description: Filter by result regex REPARSE (first 2 events)

test_cases.name: path_regex_hklm
test_cases.description: Filter by path regex HKLM (narrowed to idx 147-150)

test_cases.name: category_regex_read
test_cases.description: Filter by category regex ^Read$ (narrowed to idx 147-149)

test_cases.name: detail_regex_dword
test_cases.description: Filter by detail regex REG_DWORD (narrowed to idx 147-165)

test_cases.name: duration_ge_1
test_cases.description: Filter by duration >= 1.0 seconds (4 matching events)

test_cases.name: duration_ge_001
test_cases.description: Filter by duration >= 0.01 seconds (13 matching events)

test_cases.name: or_same_field
test_cases.description: OR logic: same-field rules — process_name svchost OR lsass (narrowed to idx <= 1)

test_cases.name: exclude_profiling
test_cases.description: Exclude filter: exclude Profiling events (narrowed to idx <= 1)

test_cases.name: include_exclude_combined
test_cases.description: Include File System + exclude SUCCESS results (narrowed to idx <= 300)

test_cases.name: reg_detail_verify
test_cases.description: Verify Registry RegSetValue detail content (event 151)

test_cases.name: fs_createfile_detail_verify
test_cases.description: Verify File System CreateFile event detail content (event 187)

test_cases.name: network_event_verify
test_cases.description: Verify Network event (TCP Receive) fields (event 215)

test_cases.name: profiling_event_verify
test_cases.description: Verify Profiling event (Idle) with n/a virtualized (event 2)

test_cases.name: timestamp_field_format
test_cases.description: Verify timestamp format is ISO 8601

test_cases.name: duration_field_format
test_cases.description: Verify duration format

test_cases.name: authentication_id_format
test_cases.description: Verify authentication_id format

test_cases.name: dsl_and_or
test_cases.description: DSL format: AND(event_class=Registry, OR(svchost, lsass), idx 217-218)

test_cases.name: dsl_not
test_cases.description: DSL format: AND(File System, NOT(SUCCESS), idx <= 300)

test_cases.name: dsl_deeply_nested
test_cases.description: DSL: OR(AND(Process, Thread Create, vmtoolsd), AND(Network, TCP Connect))

test_cases.name: dsl_complex_three_level
test_cases.description: DSL: AND(Process, OR(lsass, vmtoolsd), Thread Create) — 4 events

test_cases.name: is_operator_alias
test_cases.description: Test 'is' as alias for '==' (narrowed to idx 2-4)

test_cases.name: is_not_operator_alias
test_cases.description: Test 'is_not' as alias for '!=' (narrowed to idx <= 1)

test_cases.name: fs_createfile_with_detail
test_cases.description: File System CreateFile events with detail (narrowed to idx 187-227)

detail.Options: Non-Directory File, Open For Backup, Open Reparse Point, Open Requiring Oplock

test_cases.name: process_thread_create
test_cases.description: Process Thread Create events (narrowed to idx <= 5000)

test_cases.name: select_minimal_fields
test_cases.description: Select only default fields (process_name, operation, result)
